title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/context_assembler.py (第 1 至 180 行，共 255 行) ---
   1 | # core/context_assembler.py
   2 | """Provider-safe context assembly with explicit budgets.
   3 | 
   4 | Phase 5 introduces this module as the single place that assembles the final
   5 | LLM request context.  It keeps high-priority prompt sections, compressed state,
   6 | recent complete turns and the current user request within a rough token budget
   7 | without breaking OpenAI-style assistant/tool pairs.
   8 | """
   9 | 
  10 | from __future__ import annotations
  11 | 
  12 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  13 | from typing import Any, Dict, Iterable, List, Optional, Sequence
  14 | 
  15 | from core.turn_builder import TurnBuilder, ConversationTurn
  16 | 
  17 | 
  18 | @dataclass
  19 | class ContextBudget:
  20 |     """Approximate token budgets for each context layer."""
  21 | 
  22 |     total: int = 32000
  23 |     system: int = 8000
  24 |     plan: int = 1200
  25 |     memory: int = 1500
  26 |     compressed_state: int = 2500
  27 |     recent_turns: int = 12000
  28 |     current_user: int = 2000
  29 |     emergency_buffer_ratio: float = 0.12
  30 | 
  31 |     @property
  32 |     def available_total(self) -> int:
  33 |         reserved = int(self.total * self.emergency_buffer_ratio)
  34 |         return max(1, self.total - reserved)
  35 | 
  36 | 
  37 | @dataclass
  38 | class AssembledContext:
  39 |     """Result returned by :class:`ContextAssembler`."""
  40 | 
  41 |     system_prompt: str
  42 |     messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  43 |     token_estimate: int
  44 |     dropped_turn_count: int = 0
  45 |     dropped_message_count: int = 0
  46 |     metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
  47 | 
  48 |     @property
  49 |     def openai_messages(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
  50 |         """Return a complete OpenAI-compatible message list."""
  51 |         return [{"role": "system", "content": self.system_prompt}] + self.messages
  52 | 
  53 | 
  54 | class ContextAssembler:
  55 |     """Assemble system/memory/state/recent messages under budget.
  56 | 
  57 |     The assembler is intentionally deterministic and provider agnostic.  OpenAI
  58 |     tool-call safety is achieved by selecting only complete turns from
  59 |     :class:`TurnBuilder`; injected prompt sections are only appended to the
  60 |     system prompt and are therefore never inserted between ``assistant`` tool
  61 |     calls and their ``tool`` responses.
  62 |     """
  63 | 
  64 |     def __init__(self, budget: Optional[ContextBudget] = None, turn_builder: Optional[TurnBuilder] = None):
  65 |         self.budget = budget or ContextBudget()
  66 |         self.turn_builder = turn_builder or TurnBuilder()
  67 | 
  68 |     def assemble(
  69 |         self,
  70 |         *,
  71 |         base_system_prompt: str,
  72 |         plan_context: str = "",
  73 |         memory_context: str = "",
  74 |         compressed_state: str = "",
  75 |         messages: Optional[Sequence[Dict[str, Any]]] = None,
  76 |         current_user_message: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
  77 |         provider: str = "openai",
  78 |         budget: Optional[ContextBudget] = None,
  79 |     ) -> AssembledContext:
  80 |         """Build final prompt and recent messages.
  81 | 
  82 |         Args:
  83 |             base_system_prompt: Already-rendered base system prompt.
  84 |             plan_context: Optional explicit plan section if not already included
  85 |                 in ``base_system_prompt``.
  86 |             memory_context: Relevant long-term memory section.
  87 |             compressed_state: Current session compressed state/summary section.
  88 |             messages: Conversation history snapshot.
  89 |             current_user_message: Optional current request.  If omitted and the
  90 |                 last message is a user message, that message is treated as the
  91 |                 current request and...
